string.text: It's already been a week since the group, led by Bison, set off in search of some kind of miracle artifact...
I don't understand! I don't understand?! Why do they need it? They know it won't end well...
Alright, I'm almost there, just a little more and I'll be at the spot...
My search is over, the group has been found, and Bison... Damn, he's dead.
I don't know why the mercenaries needed to eliminate them, but I won't let this go.
I will find out who hired these thugs and take revenge for Bison and the guys.
